003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.function.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
026
027/**
028 * A mutable, ordered list of {@link HttpHeader} instances.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * Mirrors the semantics of {@code HeaderList} from {@code juneau-rest-common-classic} without the
032 * Apache HttpCore dependency. Header-name comparisons are case-insensitive by default.
033 *
034 * <h5 class='figure'>Example</h5>
035 * <p class='bjava'>
036 *    HttpHeaderList <jv>headers</jv> = HttpHeaderList.<jsm>create</jsm>()
037 *       .append(HttpHeaderBean.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"Accept"</js>, <js>"text/xml"</js>))
038 *       .append(<js>"Content-Type"</js>, <js>"text/xml"</js>);
039 * </p>
040 *
041 * <p>
042 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
043 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in
044 * the <b>next major</b> Juneau release (and possibly earlier).
045 *
046 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
047 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
048 * </ul>
049 *
050 * @since 10.0.0
051 */
052@SuppressWarnings({
053   "java:S2160" // equals() inherited from ArrayList; list equality is element-based which is correct
054})
055public class HttpHeaderList extends ArrayList<HttpHeader> {
056
057   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
058
059   /** Represents no header list in annotations. */
060   public static final class Void extends HttpHeaderList {
061      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
062   }
063
064   private boolean caseSensitive;
065
066   /**
067    * Creates a new empty {@link HttpHeaderList}.
068    *
069    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
070    */
071   public static HttpHeaderList create() {
072      return new HttpHeaderList();
073   }
074
075   /**
076    * Creates a new {@link HttpHeaderList} initialized with the given headers.
077    *
078    * @param headers The headers to include. {@code null} entries are ignored.
079    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
080    */
081   public static HttpHeaderList of(HttpHeader...headers) {
082      return new HttpHeaderList().append(headers);
083   }
084
085   /**
086    * Creates a new {@link HttpHeaderList} initialized with the given headers.
087    *
088    * @param headers The headers to include. {@code null} entries are ignored.
089    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
090    */
091   public static HttpHeaderList of(List<HttpHeader> headers) {
092      return new HttpHeaderList().append(headers);
093   }
094
095   /**
096    * Creates a new {@link HttpHeaderList} initialized with the given alternating {@code name}/{@code value} pairs.
097    *
098    * @param pairs Alternating name/value strings. Must be an even number.
099    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
100    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If the number of arguments is odd.
101    */
102   public static HttpHeaderList ofPairs(String...pairs) {
103      var x = new HttpHeaderList();
104      if (pairs == null)
105         pairs = new String[0];
106      assertArg(pairs.length % 2 == 0, "Odd number of parameters passed into HttpHeaderList.ofPairs()");
107      for (var i = 0; i < pairs.length; i += 2)
108         x.add(HttpHeaderBean.of(pairs[i], pairs[i + 1]));
109      return x;
110   }
111
112   /** Constructor. */
113   public HttpHeaderList() {
114      super();
115   }
116
117   /**
118    * Copy constructor.
119    *
120    * @param copyFrom The list to copy. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
121    */
122   protected HttpHeaderList(HttpHeaderList copyFrom) {
123      super(copyFrom);
124      this.caseSensitive = copyFrom.caseSensitive;
125   }
126
127   /**
128    * Sets whether header-name comparisons are case-sensitive. Defaults to {@code false}.
129    *
130    * @param value New value.
131    * @return This object.
132    */
133   public HttpHeaderList caseSensitive(boolean value) {
134      this.caseSensitive = value;
135      return this;
136   }
137
138   /**
139    * Appends the given header.
140    *
141    * @param value The header to add. {@code null} is ignored.
142    * @return This object.
143    */
144   public HttpHeaderList append(HttpHeader value) {
145      if (value != null)
146         add(value);
147      return this;
148   }
149
150   /**
151    * Appends the given headers in order.
152    *
153    * @param values The headers to add. {@code null} entries are ignored.
154    * @return This object.
155    */
156   public HttpHeaderList append(HttpHeader...values) {
157      if (values != null)
158         for (var v : values)
159            append(v);
160      return this;
161   }
162
163   /**
164    * Appends the given headers in order.
165    *
166    * @param values The headers to add. {@code null} entries are ignored.
167    * @return This object.
168    */
169   public HttpHeaderList append(List<HttpHeader> values) {
170      if (values != null)
171         values.forEach(this::append);
172      return this;
173   }
174
175   /**
176    * Appends a header constructed from the given name and string value.
177    *
178    * @param name The header name.
179    * @param value The header value.
180    * @return This object.
181    */
182   public HttpHeaderList append(String name, String value) {
183      return append(HttpHeaderBean.of(name, value));
184   }
185
186   /**
187    * Appends a header constructed from the given name and lazy value supplier.
188    *
189    * @param name The header name.
190    * @param value Supplier of the header value.
191    * @return This object.
192    */
193   public HttpHeaderList append(String name, Supplier<String> value) {
194      return append(HttpHeaderBean.of(name, value));
195   }
196
197   /**
198    * Sets the given header as a default. If a header with the same name already exists, this is a no-op
199    * (first-in-chain wins per name).
200    *
201    * @param value The header to set. {@code null} is ignored.
202    * @return This object.
203    */
204   public HttpHeaderList setDefault(HttpHeader value) {
205      if (value != null && !contains(value.getName()))
206         add(value);
207      return this;
208   }
209
210   /**
211    * Sets the given headers as defaults, in order. For each, if a header with the same name already exists,
212    * the entry is skipped (first-in-chain wins per name).
213    *
214    * @param values The headers to set. {@code null} entries are ignored.
215    * @return This object.
216    */
217   public HttpHeaderList setDefault(HttpHeader...values) {
218      if (values != null)
219         for (var v : values)
220            setDefault(v);
221      return this;
222   }
223
224   /**
225    * Sets a default header with the given name and value (first-in-chain wins per name).
226    *
227    * @param name The header name.
228    * @param value The header value.
229    * @return This object.
230    */
231   public HttpHeaderList setDefault(String name, String value) {
232      return setDefault(HttpHeaderBean.of(name, value));
233   }
234
235   /**
236    * Sets the given header, replacing any prior entry with the same name.
237    *
238    * @param value The header to set. {@code null} is ignored.
239    * @return This object.
240    */
241   public HttpHeaderList set(HttpHeader value) {
242      if (value == null)
243         return this;
244      removeAll(value.getName());
245      add(value);
246      return this;
247   }
248
249   /**
250    * Sets the given headers, each replacing any prior entry with the same name.
251    *
252    * @param values The headers to set. {@code null} entries are ignored.
253    * @return This object.
254    */
255   public HttpHeaderList set(HttpHeader...values) {
256      if (values != null)
257         for (var v : values)
258            set(v);
259      return this;
260   }
261
262   /**
263    * Sets a header with the given name and value, replacing any prior entry with the same name.
264    *
265    * @param name The header name.
266    * @param value The header value.
267    * @return This object.
268    */
269   public HttpHeaderList set(String name, String value) {
270      return set(HttpHeaderBean.of(name, value));
271   }
272
273   /**
274    * Removes all headers with the given name.
275    *
276    * @param name The header name.
277    * @return This object.
278    */
279   public HttpHeaderList removeAll(String name) {
280      assertArgNotNull("name", name);
281      removeIf(h -> nameMatches(h, name));
282      return this;
283   }
284
285   /**
286    * Returns {@code true} if a header with the given name is present.
287    *
288    * @param name The header name.
289    * @return {@code true} if present.
290    */
291   public boolean contains(String name) {
292      return stream().anyMatch(h -> nameMatches(h, name));
293   }
294
295   /**
296    * Returns the first header with the given name, or {@code null} if absent.
297    *
298    * @param name The header name.
299    * @return The first matching header, or {@code null}.
300    */
301   public HttpHeader getFirst(String name) {
302      return stream().filter(h -> nameMatches(h, name)).findFirst().orElse(null);
303   }
304
305   /**
306    * Returns the last header with the given name, or {@code null} if absent.
307    *
308    * @param name The header name.
309    * @return The last matching header, or {@code null}.
310    */
311   public HttpHeader getLast(String name) {
312      HttpHeader last = null;
313      for (var h : this)
314         if (nameMatches(h, name))
315            last = h;
316      return last;
317   }
318
319   /**
320    * Returns all headers with the given name in insertion order.
321    *
322    * @param name The header name.
323    * @return A new list of matching headers. Never <jk>null</jk>.
324    */
325   public List<HttpHeader> getAll(String name) {
326      return stream().filter(h -> nameMatches(h, name)).toList();
327   }
328
329   /**
330    * Returns all headers in this list as a typed array.
331    *
332    * <p>
333    * Mirrors {@code HeaderList.getAll()} from {@code juneau-rest-common-classic}.
334    *
335    * @return A new array. Never <jk>null</jk>.
336    */
337   public HttpHeader[] getAll() {
338      return toHeaderArray();
339   }
340
341   /**
342    * Performs an action on each header whose name matches.
343    *
344    * @param name The header name.
345    * @param action The action.
346    * @return This object.
347    */
348   public HttpHeaderList forEach(String name, Consumer<HttpHeader> action) {
349      for (var h : this)
350         if (nameMatches(h, name))
351            action.accept(h);
352      return this;
353   }
354
355   /**
356    * Returns a copy of this list.
357    *
358    * @return A new copy. Never <jk>null</jk>.
359    */
360   public HttpHeaderList copy() {
361      return new HttpHeaderList(this);
362   }
363
364   /**
365    * Returns the headers in this list as a typed array.
366    *
367    * @return A new array. Never <jk>null</jk>.
368    */
369   public HttpHeader[] toHeaderArray() {
370      return toArray(new HttpHeader[0]);
371   }
372
373   private boolean nameMatches(HttpHeader h, String name) {
374      return caseSensitive ? eq(h.getName(), name) : eqic(h.getName(), name);
375   }
376}
